# Contributing

Thanks for contributing to click-api!

## Guidelines

- Follow the existing file structure and naming conventions
- Functions must be silent on success, loud on error
- All public functions must have a comment header
- Test on all supported versions (1.21.x and 26.x) before submitting

## Pull Requests

- One feature or fix per PR
- Describe what changed and why
- Update `README.md` if the API surface changes

## Reporting Issues

Open an issue with your Minecraft version, pack_format, and a minimal reproduction case.
